     The Numbers Business Report

The Impossible (2012)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $19,019,882Details
International Box Office $150,570,724
Worldwide Box Office $169,590,606
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,422,046
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,659,955
Total $11,082,001
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Maria, Henry and their three sons begin their winter vacation in Thailand, looking forward to a few days in tropical paradise. But on the morning of December 26th, as the family relaxes around the pool after their Christmas festivities the night before, a terrifying roar rises up from the center of the earth. As Maria freezes in fear, a huge wall of black water races across the hotel grounds toward her. The family is caught, with tens of thousands of strangers, in the mayhem of one of the worst natural catastrophes of our time. But the true-life terror is tempered by the unexpected displays of compassion, courage and simple kindness that Maria and her family encounter during the darkest hours of their lives.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$143,818 (0.8% of total gross)
Legs:6.90 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:11.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:15 opening theaters/886 max. theaters, 6.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $27,996,662

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 21st, 2012 (Limited) by Lionsgate
January 11th, 2013 (Expands Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: October 11th, 2012 (Wide) (Spain)
October 19th, 2012 (Wide) (Lithuania)
October 26th, 2012 (Wide) (Latvia)
November 15th, 2012 (Wide) (Serbia and Montenegro)
November 21st, 2012 (Wide) (France)
Video Release: April 23rd, 2013 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense realistic disaster sequences, including disturbing injury images and brief nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2211, 2/12/2012)
Running Time: 114 minutes
Geographical setting: Thailand
Plot point: Disaster, Family Vacations, Extreme Weather
Social setting: Christmas, Summer Vacation
Source material: Inspired by a True Story
Subgenre: Survival Drama
Time period setting: 2000s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Summit Entertainment, Mediaset Espana, Apaches Entertainment, Telecinco Cinema
Production Countries: Spain, United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Maria, Henry and their three sons begin their winter vacation in Thailand, looking forward to a few days in tropical paradise. But on the morning of December 26th, as the family relaxes around the pool after their Christmas festivities the night before, a terrifying roar rises up from the center of the earth. As Maria freezes in fear, a huge wall of black water races across the hotel grounds toward her. The family is caught, with tens of thousands of strangers, in the mayhem of one of the worst natural catastrophes of our time. But the true-life terror is tempered by the unexpected displays of compassion, courage and simple kindness that Maria and her family encounter during the darkest hours of their lives.
